Description: Parent epic for all Mr. Red (MrRED) deal intelligence app work completed Jun 26–30 2026. Stack: Next.js 16, Better Auth, Neon Postgres, Drizzle, Tailwind 4.

Built /dashboard chat home with centered hero, Mr. Red branding, greeting, large composer, and suggestion pills below input. Suggestions fill the composer on click (no auto-send). Files: DealChat.tsx, ChatComposer.tsx, SuggestionChip.tsx.

Summary: Mr. Red mascot and wordmark branding
Description: Added MrRedMascot, MrRedWordmark, MrRedBrand components. Asset at public/mrred-mascot.png. Used across landing, auth, sidebar, chat, footer, favicon.
Full marketing landing at / with hero, stats strip, features grid, how-it-works, signals section, dark CTA, SiteFooter. File: LandingPage.tsx, page.tsx.
About, Privacy, Terms pages under (marketing)/layout.tsx with shared header and footer.
Moved Overview, Deals, Rules, Scoring, Gates, Leaderboard, Audit, Outcomes to Header. Sidebar reserved for New chat + chat history only. Files: Header.tsx, Sidebar.tsx, nav-items.ts, AppNavLinks.tsx.
Added chats + chat_messages schema, /api/chats CRUD, dev-store fallback, ChatSessionContext, ChatHistoryList in sidebar, URL ?chat=id. Files: db/schema/chats.ts, chat-api.ts, ChatSessionContext.tsx.
Login/signup left panel with mascot + animated TrafficLight + wordmark. File: AuthHeroPanel.tsx.
Public access for /, /about, /privacy, /terms, /login, /signup, /api/auth. File: middleware.ts.
Removed fake sidebar spacer on landing that caused right-lean layout. Container uses max-w-7xl for marketing; fluid column for dashboard. Files: Container.tsx, LandingPage.tsx, AppLayout.tsx.
Nav links hidden below lg in header; hamburger opens sidebar drawer with Navigate section. AppLayout holds mobile menu state. No horizontal scroll on mobile.
Header nav uses justify-end with increased gap. User/sign-out on far right.
Empty and active chat use wrapping pill chips with intrinsic width. File: SuggestionChip.tsx, DealChat.tsx.
Disclaimer text below composer via ChatDisclaimer.tsx (AI accuracy warning).
Red-bordered gradient composer with shadow/glow on focus. Hero and bar variants. File: ChatComposer.tsx, globals.css.
Web Speech API mic button with listening state. File: useSpeechRecognition.ts, ChatComposer.tsx.
Paperclip upload for PDF/Word/Excel/etc. Attachment chips, included in message body, mock doc analysis reply. Files: ChatComposer.tsx, DealChat.tsx.
Glass surfaces, refined typography, gradient hero/CTA, premium feature cards, radial backgrounds. Files: LandingPage.tsx, Header.tsx, Sidebar.tsx, globals.css.

Summary: Dancing mascot only on empty chat
Description: DancingMrRed removed from active chat thread; shows only on chat homepage empty state.

Summary: Favicon set to Mr. Red mascot
Description: layout.tsx icons point to /mrred-mascot.png including apple touch icon.
Chat replies return one red/amber/green verdict with reasoning only — no signal comparison table. File: chat-suggestions.ts.
Updated copy across landing, chat home, auth, about, metadata — deals, people, travel, local picks, not deals-only.
Structured ResearchBrief with product grid, specs, retailer links, Mr. Red pick, single verdict. Strimmer catalog mock. Files: lib/research/, ResearchBriefView.tsx, ChatMessage.tsx.

Disabled in-memory devStore on Vercel/serverless. Soft URL update on chat create (no router remount). sendingRef guard. Error banner on failed save. Files: dev-auth.ts, ChatSessionContext.tsx, DealChat.tsx, chat API routes.

Summary: Rename Postgres env vars to MRRED_ prefix
Description: DATABASE_URL → MRRED_DATABASE_URL and all related PG/POSTGRES vars. Updated db/index.ts, drizzle.config.ts, .env.local.
Replaced public/mrred-mascot.png with new crossed-arms mascot. Updated aspect ratio in MrRedMascot.tsx (406/615).
drizzle-kit scripts use node --env-file=.env.local to load MRRED_DATABASE_URL. package.json db:push, db:generate, db:studio.
getAppUrl() and getClientAppUrl() auto-detect localhost, Vercel preview, Vercel production domain. BETTER_AUTH_URL optional override. Files: app-url.ts, auth.ts, auth-client.ts.
Ran npm run db:push against Neon. Tables: user, session, account, chats, chat_messages, deals, etc.

Summary: Wire chat to real LLM API
Description: Replace generateMockReply() with production AI backend. Currently mock responses only.

Summary: Live product search for research briefs
Description: Replace curated strimmer mock with real search/scrape API for product links and specs.
Remove SKIP_AUTH and NEXT_PUBLIC_SKIP_AUTH on Vercel production. Require real sign-up/sign-in.

Summary: README update for MRRED_ env vars
Description: Update README.md: MRRED_DATABASE_URL, dynamic auth URLs, db:push command.
Better Auth email flows not yet implemented.
Add tests for /api/chats routes and ChatSessionContext.
